title: 2026 Grammy predictions: Odds favor Golden, Lady Gaga, and KPop
text:
Song of the Year Odds - 2026 Grammy Predictions

According to Gold Derby's predictions, "Golden" from KPop Demon Hunters is favored to win Song of the Year with 50% odds.

The song, performed by Huntr/x (featuring EJAE, Audrey Nuna, and Rei Ami) with writing credits to Ejae and Mark Sonnenblick, leads a competitive field that includes:

- "Abracadabra" — Lady Gaga
- "Anxiety" — Doechii
- "Apt." — Rosé & Bruno Mars
- "DTMF" — Bad Bunny
- "Luther" — Kendrick Lamar with SZA
- "Manchild" — Sabrina Carpenter
- "Wildflower" — Billie Eilish

The Netflix film KPop Demon Hunters has already made waves as a major awards contender, and Gold Derby's experts believe its featured track will extend that success to the Grammys.
